name: Backblaze B2
description: Backblaze B2 cloud object storage for backup and archival

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Backblaze
2. Go to Account → App Keys
3. Note your Account ID and Application Key
4. Encode them: echo -n 'accountId:applicationKey' | base64
5. Paste the encoded value below

credentialFields.label: Account ID
credentialFields.helpText: Backblaze → Account → App Keys → Account ID

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Backblaze B2 storage account is accessible

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies Backblaze B2 credentials are valid and storage access is managed
